productName: Just Cannabis Company - BHO/KIEF/FLAVOR INFUSED PREROLL - PRE-R PINEAPPLE PUNCH - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Pineapple flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of tropical, pineapple, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
